---
name: Correction
about: Report a factual error, broken link, or outdated AWS info
title: "[fix] <short description>"
labels: ["correction"]
---

## Page
<!-- Path or URL to the page that needs fixing. -->

## What's wrong
<!-- Be specific. Quote the offending line if possible. -->

## What's right
<!-- The corrected statement, ideally with a link to the canonical AWS doc. -->

## Source
<!-- AWS docs link, re:Invent talk, official blog, etc. Required for non-trivial factual changes. -->

## Service status change?

- [ ] AWS has deprecated this service
- [ ] AWS has renamed this service
- [ ] AWS has closed this service to new customers
- [ ] None of the above
